message:
fix(state): region_closed metric + leak_count reentrance guard

Two bugs found during deep audit of runtime/state.rs (asupersync-sipro):

1. Missing metrics.region_closed() in advance_region_state(): when
   complete_close() succeeds, no metric was emitted, causing OTel
   dec_regions() to never fire and active region gauge to grow
   monotonically. Fixed by adding the call with computed lifetime.

2. handle_obligation_leaks reentrant leak_count inflation: the chain
   mark_obligation_leaked -> advance_region_state -> collect_obligation_leaks
   -> handle_obligation_leaks caused N leaked obligations to inflate
   leak_count to N*(N+1)/2. Added handling_leaks bool guard to prevent
   reentrant counting (outer caller already processes all obligations).

Both bugs have targeted regression tests (70/70 tests pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
